div.head: The Under Secretary of State (Welles) to the Secretary of the Treasury (Morgenthau)
div.p: My Dear Mr. Secretary: I am glad to acknowledge your letter of February 7, with which you were good enough to enclose a copy of a letter which you had received under date of February 6 from the Ambassador of Colombia.

Let me say again how pleased I am with the result obtained by the Governmental committee and how helpful I believe the conferences held in your office have in fact been. I am most indebted to you for your unfailing cooperation in this and in all other questions.
